access_token.description: Google OAuth 2.0 access token with Search Console read scope. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition and refresh-token-exchange dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it) -- see docs.md Known limits.

base_url.description: Search Console API base URL override for tests or proxies.

site_urls.description: Comma- or newline-separated Search Console site properties (e.g. https://example.com/ or sc-domain:example.com) to fan out over for the sitemaps and search_analytics_* streams. Required for those streams only; sites itself is account-scoped and does not reference it.

site_url.description: Single Search Console site property for site_details and sitemap_details.

start_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD lower bound for search_analytics_* streams. The incremental cursor (previously-synced date), when present, overrides this on a repeat sync.

end_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD upper bound for search_analytics_* streams. Defaults to today (UTC) when unset.

search_type.description: Search Analytics searchType/type filter (web, image, video, news, discover, googleNews).

data_state.description: Search Analytics dataState filter (final or all). Omitted when unset, matching the API's own default.

page_size.description: Search Analytics rowLimit per page. Search Console caps this at 25000.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages fetched per site for search_analytics_* streams. A positive integer, or 'all'/'unlimited' (default) for no cap.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
